title: To Our Readers
content:
Here's to our Readers, Health! good Looks!
    And Joy ad infinitum
    And may they live to read our Books
    As long as we may write 'em.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Oliver Herford delivers a powerful performance in "To Our Readers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
